creator: trust_no_1@libero.it
text:
Created attachment 176369
installation log

Hello,
just to report that calibre 2.71.0 does not install on my system (10.3):

===>   Registering installation for calibre-2.71.0
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/deskutils/calibre/work/stage/usr/local/share/bash-completion/completions/calibre: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/deskutils/calibre

I have attached the installation log, hope it can help.
By the way, I had the same the same problem with version 2.70, I have waited for 2.71 before to report the bug but it is still there.
Thank you very much.
Kind regards.

Mauro.
